name: tattoo-foundation-carrier-intelligence-mcp
description: Public Model Context Protocol server published by the TATTOO Foundation (501(c)(3) survivor-founded driver-protection nonprofit, EIN 33-2580477). Provides H-2B trucking labor application data (DOL disclosure, trucking SOC codes) for driver protection and labor-coercion pattern detection. Carrier-lookup tools were withdrawn 2026-07-12.

dataset_origin.license: Donated query access to the TATTOO Foundation for public, driver-protective service.

tools.name: h2b_trucking_employers
tools.description: DOL H-2B labor disclosure data filtered to trucking SOC codes (53-30xx).

notes: Server is deployed and operational. Carrier-intelligence tools (lookup, authority history, insurance, safety history, BASIC scores, search) were withdrawn from this server on 2026-07-12; the Foundation now serves labor-protection data only.
